summary: ANDROID 🟥 Changes to some options are not properly propagated between mobile and PC part 2
scenario: Voice prompt and tone option changes in Device Settings are not properly synchronized between mobile and PC due to incorrect bitmask handling.
description_clean: Changes to some options (Calls, Hold Reminder, Incoming Call, Active Audio Tone, Answering Call, Answer/Ignore) are not properly propagated between mobile and PC when changed in Device Settings > Voice Prompts & Tones. Both platforms must use bitmasks correctly to ensure changes on one platform propagate to the other.
steps: Change one or more of the following options: Calls, Hold Reminder, Incoming Call, Active Audio Tone, Answering Call, Answer/Ignore.
Observe the changes on the PC platform.
Change one or more of the same options.
Observe the changes on the mobile platform.
expected: Changes to the specified options (Calls, Hold Reminder, Incoming Call, Active Audio Tone, Answering Call, Answer/Ignore) made on one platform (mobile or PC) should be properly propagated to the other platform using correct bitmask handling.
actual: Changes to some options are not properly propagated between mobile and PC when changed in Device Settings > Voice Prompts & Tones.
